title: The MERN Stack Architecture Flow
description: A visual representation of how data flows through the four layers of the MERN technology stack, from the client-side user interface to the database and back.
relationships: React (Client) makes HTTP requests to Express.js (Server)
Express.js (Server) uses Node.js (Runtime) to handle logic and interact with MongoDB (Database)
Express.js (Server) sends JSON responses back to React (Client)
